title: Snake Classic
description: Guide the snake to eat apples and grow longer. Avoid hitting the walls or yourself!

title: Pong Duel
description: Classic paddle vs paddle action. First to 5 points wins the match.

title: Cosmic Clicker
description: Tap to collect stardust and upgrade your cosmic empire in this idle clicker.

title: Memory Match
description: Flip cards and find matching pairs. Train your brain with fewer moves.

title: Sky Runner
description: Jump over obstacles and survive as long as you can in this endless runner.

title: Endless Runner
description: Run, double-jump, and slide through a neon obstacle course. Collect coins, dodge birds and missiles, and chase the high score.

title: Brick Breaker
description: Bounce the ball and clear every brick. Power-ups make it even more fun.

title: 2048 Tiles
description: Slide numbered tiles and combine them to reach the elusive 2048 tile.

title: Flappy Sky
description: Tap to fly through narrow gaps. How far can you go without crashing?

title: Tic Tac Toe
description: Play against the computer in this timeless strategy game.

title: Whack-a-Mole
description: Hit the moles before they hide. Beat the clock for a high score.

title: Delivery Guy After Midnight
description: Night-shift food delivery in a rainy neon city. Orders get stranger after midnight—ride your scooter, use the phone app, and survive the elevator.

title: Bounce
description: Break bricks and keep the ball in play. Choose Speed, Random, or Bricks mode and chase the high score.

title: Defender
description: Tower defense on neon maps. Build towers, stop waves of monsters, and protect your base.

title: Pacman
description: Eat dots, dodge ghosts, and clear the maze in this retro arcade classic.

title: Tetris
description: Stack falling blocks, clear lines, and climb the levels in this timeless puzzle arcade game.

title: Classic Snake
description: Grow your snake, grab food, and survive as long as you can without hitting yourself.

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Classic spider solitaire with 1, 2, or 4 suits. Build sequences and clear the tableau.

title: Tile Puzzle
description: Slide and place tiles to complete the picture before time runs out.
